datasets.name: substitutions_2022
queryLines:
SELECT
  *,
  CASE
    WHEN given_name = 'not applicable' THEN family_name
    ELSE CONCAT(given_name, ' ', family_name)
  END AS player_name
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.player_analysis.substitutions_per_player_per_tournament
WHERE
  tournament_id = :tournament_id
ORDER BY
  times_subbed_on DESC
LIMIT 10

datasets.name: goals_all_tournaments
queryLines:
SELECT
  player_id,
  family_name,
  given_name,
  team_name,
  tournament_id,
  num_goals,
  gender,
  position_code,
  CASE
    WHEN given_name = 'not applicable' THEN family_name
    ELSE CONCAT(given_name, ' ', family_name)
  END AS player_name
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.player_analysis.goals_per_player_per_tournament
ORDER BY
  num_goals DESC
LIMIT 20

datasets.name: bookings_all_tournaments
queryLines:
SELECT
  player_id,
  family_name,
  given_name,
  team_name,
  tournament_id,
  num_bookings,
  yellow_cards,
  red_cards,
  gender,
  position_code,
  CASE
    WHEN given_name = 'not applicable' THEN family_name
    ELSE CONCAT(given_name, ' ', family_name)
  END AS player_name
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.player_analysis.bookings_per_player_per_tournament
ORDER BY
  num_bookings DESC
LIMIT 20

datasets.name: bookings_2022
queryLines:
SELECT
  *,
  CASE
    WHEN given_name = 'not applicable' THEN family_name
    ELSE CONCAT(given_name, ' ', family_name)
  END AS player_name
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.player_analysis.bookings_per_player_per_tournament
WHERE
  tournament_id = :tournament_id
ORDER BY
  num_bookings DESC
LIMIT 10

datasets.name: penalty_kicks_2022
queryLines:
SELECT
  *,
  CASE
    WHEN given_name = 'not applicable' THEN family_name
    ELSE CONCAT(given_name, ' ', family_name)
  END AS player_name
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.player_analysis.penalty_kicks_per_player_per_tournament
WHERE
  tournament_id = :tournament_id
ORDER BY
  penalty_shootout_goals DESC
LIMIT 10

datasets.name: goals_2022
queryLines:
SELECT
  *,
  CASE
    WHEN given_name = 'not applicable' THEN family_name
    ELSE CONCAT(given_name, ' ', family_name)
  END AS player_name
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.player_analysis.goals_per_player_per_tournament
WHERE
  tournament_id = :tournament_id
ORDER BY
  num_goals DESC
LIMIT 10

datasets.name: subs_off_2022
queryLines:
SELECT
  *,
  CASE
    WHEN given_name = 'not applicable' THEN family_name
    ELSE CONCAT(given_name, ' ', family_name)
  END AS player_name
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.player_analysis.subs_off_per_player_wc2022
ORDER BY
  times_subbed_off DESC
LIMIT 10

datasets.name: substitutions_all_tournaments
queryLines:
SELECT
  player_id,
  family_name,
  given_name,
  team_name,
  tournament_id,
  times_subbed_on,
  times_subbed_off,
  gender,
  position_code,
  CASE
    WHEN given_name = 'not applicable' THEN family_name
    ELSE CONCAT(given_name, ' ', family_name)
  END AS player_name
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.player_analysis.substitutions_per_player_per_tournament
ORDER BY
  times_subbed_on DESC
LIMIT 20

datasets.name: total_goals_all_time
queryLines:
SELECT
  player_id,
  family_name,
  given_name,
  team_name,
  num_goals,
  gender,
  CASE
    WHEN given_name = 'not applicable' THEN family_name
    ELSE CONCAT(given_name, ' ', family_name)
  END AS player_name
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.player_analysis.total_goals_per_player
ORDER BY
  num_goals DESC
LIMIT 15

datasets.name: total_substitutions
queryLines:
SELECT
  player_id,
  family_name,
  given_name,
  team_name,
  times_subbed_on,
  times_subbed_off,
  gender,
  CASE
    WHEN given_name = 'not applicable' THEN family_name
    ELSE CONCAT(given_name, ' ', family_name)
  END AS player_name
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.player_analysis.total_substitutions_per_player
ORDER BY
  times_subbed_on DESC
LIMIT 15

datasets.name: total_penalty_kicks
queryLines:
SELECT
  player_id,
  family_name,
  given_name,
  team_name,
  penalty_shootout_goals,
  num_penalty_kicks,
  gender,
  CASE
    WHEN given_name = 'not applicable' THEN family_name
    ELSE CONCAT(given_name, ' ', family_name)
  END AS player_name
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.player_analysis.total_penalty_kicks_per_player
ORDER BY
  penalty_shootout_goals DESC
LIMIT 15

datasets.name: total_bookings
queryLines:
SELECT
  player_id,
  family_name,
  given_name,
  team_name,
  num_bookings,
  yellow_cards,
  red_cards,
  gender,
  CASE
    WHEN given_name = 'not applicable' THEN family_name
    ELSE CONCAT(given_name, ' ', family_name)
  END AS player_name
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.player_analysis.total_bookings_per_player
ORDER BY
  num_bookings DESC
LIMIT 15

datasets.name: tournament_options
queryLines:
SELECT DISTINCT
  tournament_id
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.player_analysis.goals_per_player_per_tournament
ORDER BY
  tournament_id DESC

datasets.name: bookings_trend
queryLines:
SELECT
  tournament_id,
  SUM(num_bookings) AS total_bookings,
  SUM(yellow_cards) AS total_yellow,
  SUM(red_cards) AS total_red
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.player_analysis.bookings_per_player_per_tournament
GROUP BY
  tournament_id
ORDER BY
  tournament_id ASC

datasets.name: subs_trend
queryLines:
SELECT
  tournament_id,
  SUM(times_subbed_on) AS total_substitutions
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.player_analysis.substitutions_per_player_per_tournament
GROUP BY
  tournament_id
ORDER BY
  tournament_id ASC

datasets.name: career_goals
queryLines:
SELECT
  tournament_id,
  CASE
    WHEN given_name = 'not applicable' THEN family_name
    ELSE CONCAT(given_name, ' ', family_name)
  END AS player_name,
  num_goals
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.player_analysis.goals_per_player_per_tournament
WHERE
  player_id IN (
    SELECT
      player_id
    FROM
      fifa_worldcup.player_analysis.total_goals_per_player
    ORDER BY
      num_goals DESC
    LIMIT 10
  )
ORDER BY
  tournament_id ASC

datasets.name: career_bookings
queryLines:
SELECT
  tournament_id,
  CASE
    WHEN given_name = 'not applicable' THEN family_name
    ELSE CONCAT(given_name, ' ', family_name)
  END AS player_name,
  num_bookings
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.player_analysis.bookings_per_player_per_tournament
WHERE
  player_id IN (
    SELECT
      player_id
    FROM
      fifa_worldcup.player_analysis.total_bookings_per_player
    ORDER BY
      num_bookings DESC
    LIMIT 5
  )
ORDER BY
  tournament_id ASC

datasets.name: career_penalties
queryLines:
SELECT
  tournament_id,
  CASE
    WHEN given_name = 'not applicable' THEN family_name
    ELSE CONCAT(given_name, ' ', family_name)
  END AS player_name,
  num_penalty_kicks
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.player_analysis.penalty_kicks_per_player_per_tournament
WHERE
  player_id IN (
    SELECT
      player_id
    FROM
      fifa_worldcup.player_analysis.total_penalty_kicks_per_player
    ORDER BY
      num_penalty_kicks DESC
    LIMIT 10
  )
ORDER BY
  tournament_id ASC

datasets.name: career_subs
queryLines:
SELECT
  tournament_id,
  CASE
    WHEN given_name = 'not applicable' THEN family_name
    ELSE CONCAT(given_name, ' ', family_name)
  END AS player_name,
  times_subbed_on
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.player_analysis.substitutions_per_player_per_tournament
WHERE
  player_id IN (
    SELECT
      player_id
    FROM
      fifa_worldcup.player_analysis.total_substitutions_per_player
    ORDER BY
      times_subbed_on DESC
    LIMIT 5
  )
ORDER BY
  tournament_id ASC

datasets.name: penalties_all_tournaments
queryLines:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN given_name = 'not applicable' THEN family_name
    ELSE CONCAT(given_name, ' ', family_name)
  END AS player_name,
  team_name,
  tournament_id,
  penalty_shootout_goals,
  num_penalty_kicks,
  gender,
  position_code
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.player_analysis.penalty_kicks_per_player_per_tournament
ORDER BY
  penalty_shootout_goals DESC,
  num_penalty_kicks DESC
LIMIT 20

datasets.name: gold_top_scorers_per_tournament
queryLines:
SELECT
  tournament_id,
  rank,
  player_name,
  team_name,
  num_goals,
  position_code
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.player_analysis.gold_top_scorers_per_tournament
ORDER BY
  tournament_id DESC,
  rank ASC

datasets.name: gold_career_summary
queryLines:
SELECT
  player_name,
  team_name,
  career_goals,
  career_bookings,
  career_subs_on,
  career_subs_off,
  num_penalty_kicks,
  position_code
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.player_analysis.gold_player_career_summary
ORDER BY
  career_goals DESC
LIMIT 20

datasets.name: gold_career_top20
queryLines:
SELECT
  player_name,
  team_name,
  career_goals
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.player_analysis.gold_player_career_summary
ORDER BY
  career_goals DESC
LIMIT 20
